cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit [hlp]trojúhelník o straně 60 px[/hlp], ale nenakreslí se. Najdi a oprav chybu!
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="1" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number" id="2"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="4"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="2"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number" id="3"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="5"><field name="ANGLE">120</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
